channel.title: Vlad Blajovan - Developer Tools Articles
channel.description: Articles tagged "Developer Tools" by Vlad Blajovan.

item.title: Ship Bulletproof Apps: How AI Coding Assistants Turn Debug Menus from Afterthought into Superpower
item.description: AI coding assistants have made it trivially cheap to build production-grade debug menus. This article walks through 15 use cases and how to build them.

item.title: The Claude Code Crash Course: From First Prompt to Autonomous Development Loops
item.description: Everything a developer needs to use Claude Code effectively: prompting, plan mode, worktrees, Ralph loops, Remote Control, agent teams, and multi-device orchestration.
